benefits.description: Acne redness disappeared totally, less bumps

side_effects.description: Stinging at injection site, worse in stomach areas, lasts until next day sometimes. Redness at injection site. Bruising in belly. 3mg dose with more BAC water reduces sting.

protocol_notes: Occasionally uses 3mg dose with additional BAC water to reduce sting. Injects into glutes, love handles, and upper thigh to minimize injection site pain. Uses moisturizer only for skincare, no sunscreen due to acne reaction. Also concurrently using Retatrutide.
